report.summary: Community growth cycle v12: Kaito AI InfoFi + BTCFi guides (Mar 15 Build Cycle, both now in PUBLISHED_PAGES) identified as net-new content since v11; drafted Sunday drop tweets, standalone Kaito InfoFi + BTCFi tweets, 6-post BTCFi deep-dive thread (Sat Mar 21), Discord/Telegram drop announcement, newsletter addendum for Thu Mar 19 send; 2 SVG social cards created (social-kaito-infofi-guide.svg, social-btcfi-guide-2026.svg); v11 posting schedule (Mon–Fri) preserved and extended with Sunday + Saturday content.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Sunday Mar 15 — double drop): 'Two new guides just dropped on degen0x 🔥' — Kaito InfoFi hook (attention is tradeable, Polymarket partnership) + BTCFi hook ($7B+ TVL, BTC earning yield without wrapping); dual CTAs to both guide pages

Tweet (Sunday Mar 15 — Kaito standalone): InfoFi × Prediction Markets angle — 'Kaito just launched Attention Markets with Polymarket. You can now bet on which crypto narrative gets the most mindshare'; CTA to /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide
Tweet (Sunday Mar 15 — BTCFi standalone): BTC holder yield angle — '$7B in DeFi TVL without wrapping or bridging; Babylon $1.9B in native BTC staked'; CTA to /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026

Twitter thread (Saturday Mar 21, 6 posts): BTCFi deep dive — hook on $7B TVL BTC holders don't know about; WBTC/renBTC old generation framing; Babylon native staking mechanics (timelock, slash-proof, no bridge); Stacks/sBTC decentralised multisig + demand spike; Rootstock EVM merge-mined since 2018; $304M→$7.1B growth CTA

Tweet (queued for next week — Kaito 2nd angle): Yaps → Attention Markets pivot narrative — 'Kaito killed Yaps in January when X banned reward-for-posting. Pivoted to Attention Markets by March.' founder signal angle

Discord/Telegram (Sunday Mar 15): Double drop announcement — Kaito InfoFi full description + /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide; BTCFi description + /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026; 'Both free, no wallet needed'

Newsletter addendum (Thursday Mar 19 send): Add Kaito InfoFi + BTCFi to 'NEW ON DEGEN0X' section; 3 updated subject line variants incorporating InfoFi/BTCFi angle; carries forward v11 base (Bloomberg Screener V3 + Pectra + Tax + GENIUS Act content)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-kaito-infofi-guide.svg — 1200×630 social card: Crypto Mindshare Leaderboard panel with 6 horizontal attention-score bars (Ethereum 28.4%, Bitcoin 24.1%, Solana 18.7%, Kaito/InfoFi 11.2% highlighted with +312% 7d badge, DeFi 9.3%, BTCFi 8.3%); purple/cyan brand theme; 'Attention Markets LIVE' badge; three feature pills (KAITO Token, Polymarket, Mindshare AI). Saved to /public/social-kaito-infofi-guide.svg

social-btcfi-guide-2026.svg — 1200×630 social card: BTCFi Protocol TVL Breakdown panel with 4 protocol rows (Babylon $1.9B highlighted, WBTC/cbBTC $3.1B, Stacks/sBTC $1.4B, Rootstock $0.7B) with proportional bars; large faded ₿ decorative glyph; three stat pills ($7.1B TVL, +2,237% since Jan 2024, 57K BTC staked); 4 property checkmarks (no wrapping, non-custodial, no bridge risk, BTC stays on BTC chain); '$304M → $7.1B · 2,237% in 2 years' growth badge. Saved to /public/social-btcfi-guide-2026.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Net-new pages since v11: /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide + /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026 — both promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES in Mar 15 Build Cycle (InfoFi & BTCFi Guides)

Kaito InfoFi scored 92/100: Polymarket Attention Markets partnership launched March 2026 = white-hot narrative; 'attention as alpha' is a tier-1 crypto Twitter discussion; KAITO token gives a price-correlated hook; query clusters include 'kaito ai infofi', 'kaito attention markets', 'kaito polymarket', 'kaito mindshare', 'infofi crypto 2026'

BTCFi scored 90/100: $7B+ TVL at BTC $71K creates perfect BTC holder timing; Babylon already covered in v10 social but BTCFi guide is broader ecosystem context; query clusters include 'btcfi guide', 'bitcoin defi 2026', 'earn yield bitcoin', 'babylon protocol btc staking', 'stacks sbtc 2026'
meme-launchpads-guide remains NOT in published-pages.ts — hold-draft from v11 still applies; post on publish-day trigger only
Site Day 17 — GSC organic signals still expected imminently; BTCFi + InfoFi content published today positions degen0x for these emerging query clusters ahead of indexing window

v11 posting schedule (Mon Mar 16 Bloomberg Screener → Tue EIP-7702 thread → Wed Tax + GENIUS Act → Thu newsletter → Fri poll) is unchanged and carries forward; v12 adds Sunday drop content and Saturday BTCFi thread
Thursday newsletter (Mar 19) now covers: Bloomberg Screener V3 live data + Kaito InfoFi + BTCFi + GENIUS Act + Meme Launchpads + Pectra + Tax countdown — strongest week of content yet

Open carry-over from v11: Build error AICourseRecommendations.tsx apostrophe still unpatched (blocking Sprint 59); Vercel deploy pending manual trigger; Sprint 58 Bloomberg Screener live data at 0% code progress
